news.headline: Bob Iger reflects on 10 years of Shanghai Disneyland as it defies the Chinese pullback
news.summary: Shanghai Disneyland hit 100 million cumulative visitors in 2025, according to the company. It's a relatively new but important foothold in Disney's history.

news.headline: Dow Jones Futures Fall With U.S. Markets Shut; Nvidia Leads 5 Stocks Near Buy Points, SpaceX Needs This
news.summary: Dow Jones futures fell slightly Friday, along with S&P 500 futures and Nasdaq futures. U.S. stock markets will be closed for the Juneteenth holiday. The stock market rebounded this past week, though the gains were concen

news.headline: SpaceX Has a Rapidly Approaching $20 Billion Surprise for Its Shareholders -- and They're Not Going to Be Happy
news.summary: A sizable chunk of SpaceX's $75 billion initial public offering (IPO) capital raise is already spoken for.

news.headline: Just 4 "Magnificent Seven" Stocks Are Still More Valuable Than SpaceX. Could SpaceX Be a Better Buy Than All of Them?
news.summary: SpaceX wasted no time surpassing Amazon, Meta Platforms, and Tesla in market cap.

keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $740.66 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $746.78 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into the open: Bullish — favor calls / long delta.
Use QQQ $740.66 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: NVDA CALL — enter $12.73–$14.07, target $20.10+, stop $8.04.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Futures point to a firmer open with QQQ +2.51% and SPY +0.79%. Composite sentiment +51 (Bullish). The tape is being driven mainly by qqq / mega-cap tech, vix, spy trend. VIX at 13.26 (-3.48%). Environment read: favor calls / long delta. Consumer Discretionary (+1.99%) is leading while Energy (-2.06%) lags. Premarket strength in AMD, AVGO; weakness in JPM, XOM. The desk's highest-conviction setup is NVDA (7.9/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
